summary: Update LiveContextHook constant from context-hook-v1 to hook-v2.
patch:
diff --git a/internal/review/live_context_hook.go b/internal/review/live_context_hook.go
--- a/internal/review/live_context_hook.go
+++ b/internal/review/live_context_hook.go
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 package review
 
 // LiveContextHook is an allowlisted one-line edit target for codebase-dag live runs.
-const LiveContextHook = "context-hook-v1"
+const LiveContextHook = "hook-v2"
